Event: Titatnic Excavation - Oct 2024
Event Date: 29/10/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: AM11
Longevity Amulet

Once in a while, the unit casts restoration on 3 random allies. The allies have a random debuff removed and restore 128000 health. Also, their damage is increased by 15% and health by 15% for 4 sec. If the target units have 50% or less health before they get restoration, they also go into a frenzy. They increase in size and all their stats are increased by 15% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
